title: Pinalia aeridostachya
taxonomy: Pinalia aeridostachya is classified under the family Orchidaceae. This family consists of approximately 30,000 species of orchids, which are one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants. The genus Pinalia is a part of the subtribe Aeridinae, which is a group of orchids commonly known as the 'maiden's hair' orchids. The species Pinalia aeridostachya is native to tropical and subtropical regions, particularly in Asia. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants for support.
uses: Pinalia aeridostachya, also known as the 'Dwarf Dragon Orchid', has been found to possess potential medicinal properties due to the presence of various bioactive compounds within its plant parts.
